$schema_comment: Mono runtime internal struct offsets for Unity (BDWGC fork), 32-bit (i686). See docs/notes/phase0-mono-offsets-research.md for derivation.
extracted_by: source-derivation (Unity-Technologies/mono GitHub) + Phase 2.3 disasm probing will overwrite

MonoClass.$confidence: HIGH (verified by brute-force on Hearthstone Mono)
MonoClass.$note: Verified 2026-04-19: all field offsets are 4 bytes higher than the GCC-style bitfield-packing estimate, suggesting MSVC inserts 4 bytes of bitfield padding. parent / vtable_size / runtime_info validated by self-consistency tests on System.Object/String/Int32/Type.
MonoClass.name: 0x2C
MonoClass.$field_count_note: field_count is in MonoClassDef which extends MonoClass. With next_class_cache verified at 0xA0, field_count = next_class_cache - 4 = 0x9C (the field directly preceding next_class_cache in MonoClassDef).
MonoClass.$next_class_cache_note: Verified 2026-04-19 by brute-force scan: 0xA0 yields 50/50 valid hash collision chains in Hearthstone Mono

MonoVTable.$confidence: HIGH (verified against ServiceManager vtable in Hearthstone Mono)
MonoVTable.$verified_2026_04_19: Inspected ServiceManager (vtable_size=4) at 0x26B2A7D0: vtable[0..4] live at +0x2C..+0x38, static_field_data slot at +0x3C. The 8-byte gap above 0x24 (vs Mono source) likely comes from MSVC bitfield/padding behaviour around imt_collisions_bitmap and runtime_generic_context.
MonoVTable.$static_data_note: static_field_data is at vtable_base + vtable_array_start + class.vtable_size * ptr_size (NOT a fixed offset). Consumers compute it dynamically.

MonoAssembly.$note: image follows MonoAssemblyName which is ~0x38 bytes after ref_count(4) + basedir(4)

MonoImage.$confidence: HIGH for class_cache (verified by brute-force scan)
MonoImage.$note: Verified 2026-04-19: class_cache @ +0x35C in Hearthstone Assembly-CSharp yields hash table with size=6247, table populated with valid MonoClass* entries. name probed via mono_image_get_name disasm.
MonoImage.name: 0x14
MonoImage.$class_cache_note: class_cache is MonoInternalHashTable struct (not pointer): {hash_func*, key_extract*, next_value_func*, size:u32, num_entries:u32, table:MonoClass**}. Total size ~0x1C bytes.

MonoInternalHashTable.$note: Embedded struct in MonoImage.class_cache. Layout from Unity mono source mono-internal-hash.h

MonoDomain.$confidence: HIGH (verified by brute-force scan against running Hearthstone)
MonoDomain.$note: Verified 2026-04-19: GSList head at +0x58 in root MonoDomain yields mscorlib, UnityEngine.* etc. when traversed.
